title: Christopher Nolan rejects Matt Damon's 'defeatist' outlook on the future of cinema after making The Odyssey
snippet: Christopher Nolan has responded to Matt Damon's concerns about the future of large-scale filmmaking, saying he disagrees with the actor's defeatist outlook. He also said that he believes cinema remains a vital medium that continues to evolve.

title: Flip-flops on Hormuz keep India refiners on the edge as crude spikes
snippet: India's crude oil supplies remain secure for now, but renewed tensions in West Asia have revived worries over a higher oil import bill, inflation and slower economic growth if oil prices stay elevated. Brent crude rose nearly 5% on Tuesday.

title: Top Open Championship storylines: Scottie and Rory

title: Scheffler: Coming in 2nd worse than missing cut
snippet: Scottie Scheffler is preparing for the 154th Open Championship preceded by a rare weekend off. Scheffler missed the cut at last week's Scottish Open, ending his streak of 78 straight PGA Tour starts in which he made the cut.

title: Jennifer Lopez and Ben Affleck's $68m mansion finds buyer after price cut
snippet: Jennifer Lopez has sold the Beverly Hills mansion she shared with Ben Affleck. The couple purchased the large estate for over sixty million dollars in 2023. After their divorce, the property was listed and relisted multiple times. Affleck gifted his share to Lopez, who then pursued the sale alone.

title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
snippet: DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI standards body modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.
